LoginPage.title: Login
LoginPage.subtitle: Welcome to the LevelUp Academy portal
LoginPage.helperText: Use your school account credentials to continue
LoginPage.successMessage: Credentials are valid and ready to submit
LoginPage.brandDescription: An elegant learning platform for a smooth, focused school journey.

validation.usernameInvalid: Please enter a valid username (3+ characters, letters/numbers/._- only)
validation.passwordInvalid: Please enter a valid password (8+ characters)

SchoolSettings.title: School Settings
SchoolSettings.description: Manage school profile, contact channels, and social presence from one place.

validation.logoImageOnly: Logo must be an image file.
validation.sealSize: School seal file size must not exceed 5 MB.

AcademicYear.title: Academic Year
AcademicYear.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this academic year?
AcademicYear.deleteBlockedByActiveStudent: This academic year cannot be deleted because it is linked to an active student record.
AcademicYear.linkedToActiveStudentYes: Linked to an active student record
AcademicYear.linkedToActiveStudentNo: Not linked to an active student record
AcademicYear.activeHelpText: This option allows you to register new students, create classes, and add financial payments for students.

fields.name: Academic year name
fields.allowGradeEditAfterEnd: Allow grade edits after academic year ends
fields.allowStudentFileEditAfterEnd: Allow student file edits after academic year ends

hierarchy.title: Academic Year Hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Select an academic year to view its status, details, and linked semesters in an interactive hierarchy.
hierarchy.noSelection: No academic year is available to display.
hierarchy.noSemestersLinked: No semesters are linked to this academic year yet.

Semesters.title: Semesters
Semesters.description: Manage semesters and link each semester to an academic year.
Semesters.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this semester?

validation.nameTooShort: Semester name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.academicYearRequired: Please select the related academic year.
validation.semesterStartDateRequired: Please enter the semester start date.
validation.semesterEndDateRequired: Please enter the semester end date.
validation.classesStartDateRequired: Please enter the classes start date.
validation.classesEndDateRequired: Please enter the classes end date.
validation.finalExamDateRequired: Please enter the final exam date.
validation.semesterEndBeforeStart: Semester end date must be after semester start date.
validation.classesEndBeforeStart: Classes end date must be after classes start date.
validation.finalExamBeforeSemesterStart: Final exam date cannot be before semester start date.

EducationalStages.title: Educational Stages
EducationalStages.description: Manage educational stages used later for student classification.
EducationalStages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this educational stage?

validation.nameTooShort: Stage name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.minimumAgeInvalid: Required student age must be 3 years or more.
validation.teachingLanguageTooShort: Teaching language must contain at least 2 characters.

Grades.title: Grades
Grades.description: Manage grades and link each grade to its educational stage.
Grades.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this grade?
Grades.activeHelpText: This option allows you to register new students and add financial payments for students.

validation.nameTooShort: Grade name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.minimumPassingGradeInvalid: Minimum passing grade must be between 0 and 100.
validation.duplicateName: Grade name already exists. Duplicate names are not allowed.

Sections.title: Sections
Sections.description: Split grades into smaller sections and manage section details.
Sections.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this section?

validation.nameTooShort: Section name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.defaultCapacityInvalid: Default capacity must be between 1 and 200.

Subjects.title: Subjects
Subjects.description: Manage subjects and link them to grades and teachers with schedule and assessment settings.
Subjects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this subject?

validation.nameTooShort: Subject name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.teachingLanguageTooShort: Teaching language must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.minimumPassingGradeInvalid: Minimum passing grade must be between 0 and 100.
validation.atLeastOneGradeConfig: Please add at least one grade configuration.
validation.weeklySessionsInvalid: Weekly sessions must be between 1 and 20.
validation.lessonDurationInvalid: Lesson duration must be between 20 and 180 minutes.
validation.atLeastOneTeacher: Please select at least one teacher.
validation.duplicateTeacher: A teacher cannot be selected more than once.
validation.atLeastOneScoreBreakdown: Please add at least one score breakdown item.
validation.activityNameTooShort: Activity name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.activityPercentageInvalid: Activity percentage must be between 0 and 100.
validation.duplicateGradeConfig: The same grade cannot be linked twice to this subject.
validation.scoreBreakdownMustTotal100: Score breakdown percentages must total exactly 100%.
validation.duplicateName: Subject name already exists. Duplicate names are not allowed.

Classrooms.title: Classrooms
Classrooms.description: Organize physical classrooms and facilities in the school.
Classrooms.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this classroom?

validation.nameTooShort: Classroom name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.capacityInvalid: Classroom capacity must be between 1 and 500.
validation.buildingNameTooShort: Building name must contain at least 2 characters.

TimetableSettings.title: Timetable Settings
TimetableSettings.description: Automatically generate lessons based on the entered count, with day, time, and break management.

validation.nameTooShort: Lesson name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.teachingDaysRequired: Please select at least one teaching day.
validation.endTimeBeforeStart: Lesson end time must be after start time.
validation.durationInvalid: Lesson duration is invalid. Check start and end times.
validation.breakNameTooShort: Break name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.breakStartTimeRequired: Please enter the break start time.
validation.breakEndTimeRequired: Please enter the break end time.
validation.breakEndTimeBeforeStart: Break end time must be after break start time.
validation.numberOfSessionsInvalid: Number of lessons must be between 1 and 20.
validation.sessionsCountMismatch: Generated lesson rows do not match the entered count.
